title: Cowizz Ideas
description: A mod that adds 9 dumb ideas from my YouTube comments section
body:
# Cowizz Ideas
This mod adds **9 ideas** to the game. The ideas came from my comments section.

### New In-Game:
- Poulet Musclé : A powerful buffed chicken.
- Slime Quantique : A new slime that teleports you randomly up to 100 blocks of your current position when you ride it.
- Chickens now can fly, but they drop explosive eggs when you are under them.
- Rien : An item that is invisible, and do nothing ("Rien" is the translation in French of "nothing").
- Spinosaure : a picture of a Spinosaure.
- Iron golems now attack every friendly creature and protect mobs.
- Mob are now tamable with gun powder.
- Villageois Pillard : A new job for the villagers (the workstation is an emerald block), the Villageois Pillard steal emeralds in your inventory.
- Ander Pearl : Like an Ender Pearl, but teleport you randomly instead of where it hit the ground.
## Other Informations:
- The only supported version of Minecraft is **1.20.1**.
- Make sure to download the **Fabric API Version 0.92.2+1.20.1** (it will not work without it)
